# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  vmCount: { type: int, defaultValue: 3 }
variables:
  location: westus2
  imageReference:
    publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
    offer: WindowsServer
    sku: 2019-Datacenter
    version: latest
  osDiskType: StandardSSD_LRS
  vmSize: Standard_D2s_v3
  adminUsername: myadminuser
  adminPassword: myadminpass
  storageAccountName: mystorageaccount$suffix
  storageAccountSkuName: Standard_LRS
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
    name: pip$index
    apiVersion: 2019-08-01
    location: $location
    properties:
      publicIPAllocationMethod: Static
  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    name: vm$index
    apiVersion: 2019-07-01
    location: $location
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: $vmSize
      osProfile:
        computerName: vm$index
        adminUsername: $adminUsername
        adminPassword: $adminPassword
        windowsConfiguration:
          provisionVMAgent: true
          enableAutomaticUpdates: false
      storageProfile:
        imageReference: $imageReference
        osDisk:
          name: 'osDisk'
          caching: ReadWrite
          createOption: FromImage
          diskSizeGB: 128
        dataDisks:
        - lun: 0
          diskSizeGB: 1023
          createOption: Empty
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
        - id: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces/nic$index
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    name: nsg$index
    apiVersion: 2019-08-01
    location: $location
    properties:
      securityRules:
      - name: allowrdp
        properties:
          priority: 100
          access: Allow
          direction: Inbound
          sourceAddressPrefixes: '*'
          destinationPortRange: 3389
          protocol: TCP
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
    name: nic$index
    apiVersion: 2019-08-01
    location: $location
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
      - name: ipconfig1
        properties:
          publicIPAddress:
            id: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses/pip$index
          privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
          subnet:
            id: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/vnet1/subnets/subnet1
